assertions.text: Uses 'claudit highlight path createScimGroup validateGroup save --project-dir ...' correctly
assertions.evidence: Ran exactly that command. Produced JSON Results Format with 3 entries, one per function, with distinct RGBA colors.

assertions.text: Does NOT use wrong syntax like 'claudit highlight --path' or omit --project-dir
assertions.evidence: Correct syntax used throughout: 'claudit highlight path <f1> <f2> <f3> --project-dir <dir>'.

assertions.text: Produces or describes output in the Results Format with color-annotated spans
assertions.evidence: Output was JSON conforming to Results Format. validateGroup fully resolved; createScimGroup and save returned <unknown> due to Java indexing limitation (correctly noted).
